MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-20-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jul-18-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
STEPHAN JAY PERELSON, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Johnny Schenck
DAVID AUGUST DELBON, Esq. on behalf of defendant CCSF

The parties settled this matter after being sent to Judge Pro Tem. Terms of the settlement are as follows: Defendant CCSF to pay plaintiff Johnny Schenck the sum of $10,000.00 which includes liens. Each side to bear their own costs. This settlement is subject to approval by the Board.

Judge Robert L. Dondero; Clerks: Vera Mu/JIRoque; Reporter: Jo Ann Bryce, CSR #3321 (206)
